response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches 'G4L' (Chorus/Post-Chorus) and 'Odo'. The provided 'G4L' reference lyrics were for an earlier verse not present in this clip; I have transcribed the chorus as heard. 'Odo' lyrics match the reference accurately. Timestamps are strictly synced to vocal onsets and offsets, with gaps preserved during instrumentals.
